description: Black, round toed shoes with central lace fasteningLeather upper with overlays, reinforced overlay at the heel collar, foxing around the toe boxPadded inner and tongue with soft footbedCo-Molded PU3 footbed with ImpactsorbDual density foams tuned to support and lessen shock, eliminates heel bruisingRubber midsoleRubber outsole with grooves
